evals.prompt: Fix all failing tests until they pass
evals.expected_output: The agent sets up an iterative loop: success criteria = all tests passing, max iterations ~8. Each iteration: fix failures → re-run tests → check if all pass → continue or stop. Reports metrics per iteration.
assertions: The agent defines clear success criteria (all tests passing)
The agent sets a max iteration limit
The agent tracks metrics per iteration (e.g., 42/50 → 48/50 → 50/50)
The agent stops when criteria are met

evals.prompt: Clean up all linter warnings in my Python project
evals.expected_output: The agent iterates: run linter → fix warnings → re-run → repeat until 0 warnings. Tracks warning count per iteration.
assertions: The agent runs the linter as a validator
The agent tracks warning count across iterations
The agent uses automated validation over manual inspection

evals.prompt: Optimize this API endpoint until response time is under 100ms
evals.expected_output: The agent iterates: benchmark → optimize → re-benchmark → check target. Includes convergence detection (stop if improvement < 10% over 3 iterations).
assertions: The agent defines success criteria with specific target (< 100ms)
The agent uses benchmarking as validation
The agent tracks response time metrics per iteration

evals.prompt: My code has been stuck at 75% test coverage for 3 iterations. What should I do?
evals.expected_output: The agent identifies this as a stuck state: analyze why progress stopped (diminishing returns), try different approach (target uncovered branches), consider if 75% is acceptable, or adjust strategy.
assertions: The agent identifies the stuck state pattern
The agent suggests analyzing why progress stopped
The agent recommends trying a different approach or accepting convergence

evals.prompt: Run a quality improvement loop on my codebase: lint, format, test
evals.expected_output: The agent sets up a multi-validator loop: run linter → fix → run formatter → fix → run tests → fix → repeat. Uses hybrid termination (criteria + convergence).
assertions: The agent sets up multiple validators in sequence
The agent defines clear success criteria for each validator
The agent reports metrics per iteration
